name: Gingered Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare all fruit by washing, peeling if desired.
2. Remove pits and slice into bite-size pieces.
3. Melons may be scooped out with a melon baller if desired.
4. Combine all fruit in a large ceramic bowl.
5. Mix lime juice, lime rind, honey, and chopped ginger together.
6. Pour the mixture over the fruit and toss to coat evenly.
7. Marinate for at least six hours.
8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
